title: space invite code never consumed — unlimited redemptions
description: daemon/src/store.rs:1163-1244: use_space_invite_code adds the member to space_member and COMMITs, but never deletes the invite row from space_invite. An invite code meant to be single-use can be redeemed by unlimited distinct users. Each new user gets added (AlreadyMember prevents double-adding the same user, but new users are added freely). Fix: DELETE FROM space_invite WHERE code = ? inside the transaction before COMMIT, or add a uses_remaining column if multi-use invites are intended.
